metadata.description: Amazon FBA online-arbitrage expert team (24 fba- skills): sourcing & deal analysis, Keepa/SellerAmp/chart reading, market & data analysis, listing optimization, the project rituals (journal, brain, RAG, leads), and a full engineering crew (architect, coder, reviewer, debugger, database, design, QA, innovation) to build the system.

plugins.name: amazon-fba-oa
plugins.description: 24 fba- skills and roles for an Amazon FBA online-arbitrage operation: sourcing & deal analysis, Keepa/SellerAmp/chart reading, market & data analysis, listing optimization, project rituals (journal/brain/RAG/leads), and a full engineering crew. Encodes the single-source buy/no-buy gates, the allowed-vs-profitable split, and human-approval guardrails so every AI session follows them automatically.
